title: Daewoo Glide Iron, The Ultra Glide, 2600W Steam Iron With Ceramic Soleplate, High Burst Steam And Precision Tip With An Adjustable Temperature Dial And Self Clean Function, Red And Black
features: POWERFUL WRINKLE REMOVAL – Experience dynamic ironing capabilities with versatile steam and spray options. Harness the high burst steam for tackling even the most stubborn creases, ensuring a seamless and efficient ironing experience

EFFORTLESS PRECISION – The Ultra Glide's precision tapered tip targets tough creases in hard-to-reach areas, coupled with a durable ceramic soleplate that effortlessly glides and smoothens wrinkles, ensuring a flawless finish

CUSTOMIZED FABRIC CARE – Achieve perfect results with the Ultra Glide's adjustable temperature dial, featuring settings for Linen, Cotton, Wool, Silk, and Nylon. Tailor the iron's heat to suit different fabrics, ensuring optimal care for your garments

SAFETY FIRST – Prioritizing your safety with a clear indicator light, automatic shut-off after no movement, 30 seconds in a level position or 8 minutes upright, and a red light during the heating process, ensuring a secure, worry-free ironing experience

APPLIANCE LONGEVITY – Benefit from the anti-calcium function, preventing calcium and limescale buildup, coupled with a convenient self-cleaning feature. Use it monthly, or as needed, to ensure a prolonged and efficient appliance lifespan

CONVENIENT WATER MANAGEMENT – Simplify ironing with a spacious 320ML tank featuring a visible max line, anti-drip technology for mess-free usage, and an included measuring cup for precise water filling, making your ironing routine effortless and efficient
CONFIDENCE GUARANTEED – Trust in the Daewoo Power Glide with a substantial 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring reliable performance for years to come.
description: Tailored for individuals leading a fast-paced life, the Daewoo Ultra Glide 2600W Steam Iron is the go-to solution for those seeking efficient and precise garment care. Ideal for busy lifestyles, this iron caters to anyone in need of a quick and dependable way to maintain wrinkle-free attire. Equipped with a substantial 320ML tank featuring a visible max line, anti-drip technology, and a handy measuring cup, this iron ensures effortless water management. The precision tapered tip easily handles touch creases in hard-to-reach areas, while the durable ceramic soleplate smoothly glides over fabrics. Adjust the temperature seamlessly with the temperature dial, offering settings for Linen, Cotton, Wool, Silk, and Nylon. Ensuring safety, the iron includes an automatic shut-off after 30 seconds in a level position or 8 minutes upright, accompanied by a clear indicator light. The powerful steam and spray options, make removing wrinkles a breeze with high burst steam. Backed by a 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, the Daewoo Ultra Glide guarantees long-term reliability, offering hassle-free ironing experience for a wrinkle free wardrobe.
